package.name: manus_ros2_msgs
package.description: Stub definitions of the Manus ROS2 SDK message types used by this workspace. Fields mirror the public Manus ROS2 documentation: https://docs.manus-meta.com/3.1.0/Plugins/SDK/ROS2/ros2%20package/ Replace this directory with the official manus_ros2_msgs package when deploying against a real Manus glove + SDK.
